sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n87579" key="proi+ppasi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προϊππ-ᾰσία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n87579.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">riding before others,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1620.tlg001:2:3:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polyaen.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.3.14</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
